title: cotoneaster rugosus var. henryanus
intro: Cotoneaster rugosus var. henryanus, also known as the rough-leaved cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Cotoneaster rugosus var. henryanus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
